mapper.insert:
insert into bangumi_character (id, role, name, infobox, summary, comments, collects) values
(#{item.id}, #{item.role}, #{item.name}, #{item.infobox}, #{item.summary}, #{item.comments}, #{item.collects})
on duplicate key update role = values(role), name = values(name), infobox = values(infobox), summary = values(summary), comments = values(comments), collects = values(collects)

insert into bangumi_episode (id, name, name_cn, description, airdate, disc, duration, subject_id, sort, type) values
(#{item.id}, #{item.name}, #{item.nameCn}, #{item.description}, #{item.airdate}, #{item.disc}, #{item.duration}, #{item.subjectId}, #{item.sort}, #{item.type})
on duplicate key update name = values(name), name_cn = values(name_cn), description = values(description), airdate = values(airdate), disc = values(disc), duration = values(duration), subject_id = values(subject_id), sort = values(sort), type = values(type)

insert into bangumi_person (id, name, type, career, infobox, summary, comments, collects) values
(#{item.id}, #{item.name}, #{item.type}, #{item.career}, #{item.infobox}, #{item.summary}, #{item.comments}, #{item.collects})
on duplicate key update name = values(name), type = values(type), career = values(career), infobox = values(infobox), summary = values(summary), comments = values(comments), collects = values(collects)

insert into bangumi_subject (id, type, name, name_cn, infobox, platform, summary, nsfw, tags, meta_tags, score, score_details, `rank`, date, favorite, series) values
(#{item.id}, #{item.type}, #{item.name}, #{item.nameCn}, #{item.infobox}, #{item.platform}, #{item.summary}, #{item.nsfw}, #{item.tags}, #{item.metaTags}, #{item.score}, #{item.scoreDetails}, #{item.rank}, #{item.date}, #{item.favorite}, #{item.series})
on duplicate key update type = values(type), name = values(name), name_cn = values(name_cn), infobox = values(infobox), platform = values(platform), summary = values(summary), nsfw = values(nsfw), tags = values(tags), meta_tags = values(meta_tags), score = values(score), score_details = values(score_details), `rank` = values(`rank`), date = values(date), favorite = values(favorite), series = values(series)

insert into bangumi_subject_search (subject_id, type, nsfw, name, name_cn, aliases, tags_text, meta_tags_text, year, platform, score, subject_rank, favorite_done, search_text) values
(#{item.subjectId}, #{item.type}, #{item.nsfw}, #{item.name}, #{item.nameCn}, #{item.aliases}, #{item.tagsText}, #{item.metaTagsText}, #{item.year}, #{item.platform}, #{item.score}, #{item.subjectRank}, #{item.favoriteDone}, #{item.searchText})
on duplicate key update type = values(type), nsfw = values(nsfw), name = values(name), name_cn = values(name_cn), aliases = values(aliases), tags_text = values(tags_text), meta_tags_text = values(meta_tags_text), year = values(year), platform = values(platform), score = values(score), subject_rank = values(subject_rank), favorite_done = values(favorite_done), search_text = values(search_text)

insert into bangumi_person_character (person_id, subject_id, character_id, type, summary) values
(#{item.personId}, #{item.subjectId}, #{item.characterId}, #{item.type}, #{item.summary})
on duplicate key update type = values(type), summary = values(summary)

insert into bangumi_person_relation (person_type, person_id, related_person_id, relation_type, spoiler, ended) values
(#{item.personType}, #{item.personId}, #{item.relatedPersonId}, #{item.relationType}, #{item.spoiler}, #{item.ended})
on duplicate key update spoiler = values(spoiler), ended = values(ended)

insert into bangumi_subject_character (character_id, subject_id, type, `order`) values
(#{item.characterId}, #{item.subjectId}, #{item.type}, #{item.order})
on duplicate key update type = values(type), `order` = values(`order`)

insert into bangumi_subject_person (person_id, subject_id, position, appear_eps) values
(#{item.personId}, #{item.subjectId}, #{item.position}, #{item.appearEps})
on duplicate key update appear_eps = values(appear_eps)

insert into bangumi_subject_relation (subject_id, relation_type, related_subject_id, `order`) values
(#{item.subjectId}, #{item.relationType}, #{item.relatedSubjectId}, #{item.order})
on duplicate key update `order` = values(`order`)
